case_title: NABIL JEMAI VS. SOCIETE AIR FRANCE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,777.00 FILED BY JEMAI, NABIL AS TO DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-07-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM AS TO PLAINTIFF JEMAI, NABIL
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM, FILED BY THE DEFENDANT IS GRANTED.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE AS TO PLAINTIFF JEMAI, NABIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEMAI, NABIL AS TO DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF NABIL JEMAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANNALISA RAMNARIAN (LEGAL ADMIN). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEMAI, NABIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE $1,780.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,845.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
